chunks.text: Course: EE W290C | EECS at UC Berkeley EE W290C. Advanced Topics in Circuit Design Catalog Description: Seminar-style course presenting an in-depth perspective on one specific domain of integrated circuit design. Most often, this will address an application space that has become particularly relevant in recent times. Examples are serial links, ultra low-power design, wireless transceiver design, etc. Units: 3 Also Offered As: ELENG W290C Prerequisites: MAS-IC students only. Formats: Fall: 3 hours of web-based lecture per week Summer: 4.5 hours of web-based lecture per week Spring: 3 hours of web-based lecture per week Grading Basis: Student Option Final Exam Status: No Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
